Place your phone approx. 30 cm/12 inches from your eyes.
2. Cover the weaker eye (if there is one). Look at the screen.
3. Now cover your better/other eye and look at the screen again.
4. Consider the redness of the object with the better eye 100%. How red does the object look with the weaker eye? Select your weaker eye with the radio buttons and type the value into the box. If necessary, repeat steps 2-3 until you can clearly determine a value.
